summary: Iteration 80: Tested Culinary/Pastry de-duplication with 3 extracted shared modules (Menu Design Studio, Food Gallery, Dish Assembly) and desktop keyboard shortcuts. All 16 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing confirmed: new sidebar entries under 'Culinary Operations', Kitchen Routing panel with 4 tabs, keyboard shortcuts (Alt+H, Alt+D), and /guest-order page working end-to-end.
critical_code_review_comments: Menu Design Studio, Food Gallery, and Dish Assembly panels show fallback/loading state when opened standalone - this is expected behavior as they need Culinary context providers. In production they would be wrapped with needed providers.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all new sidebar entries, Kitchen Routing, keyboard shortcuts, guest ordering working)

seed_data_creation: Kitchen Routing seeds 8 stations and 5 printers on first API call
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 80 tested Culinary/Pastry de-duplication. Three modules were extracted as standalone panels: Menu Design Studio, Food Gallery, Dish Assembly. They appear in sidebar under 'Culinary Operations' between Pastry and Schedule. Kitchen Routing is under 'HR & Administration'. 8 keyboard shortcuts registered: Alt+H (Housekeeping), Alt+I (IRD), Alt+C (Concierge), Alt+E (Engineering), Alt+F (FOH), Alt+D (Dashboard), Alt+G (Guest360), Alt+R (Kitchen Routing). The extracted modules lazy-load from Culinary's sections and may show fallback when opened standalone.

frontend_sidebar_tests: CULINARY OPERATIONS group shows: Culinary, Pastry, Menu Design Studio, Food Gallery, Dish Assembly, Schedule, etc.
HR & ADMINISTRATION group shows: Admin & Onboarding, Kitchen Routing, HR & Payroll, etc.
Menu Design Studio entry visible in sidebar
Food Gallery entry visible in sidebar
Dish Assembly entry visible in sidebar
Kitchen Routing entry visible in sidebar
frontend_panel_tests: Kitchen Routing panel opens with 4 tabs (Overview, Stations, Printers & KDS, Outlet Routing)
Kitchen Routing Overview shows 8 stations, 5 printers, 1 outlet, 5 online
Menu Design Studio panel opens (shows loading/fallback as expected)
IRD & Minibar panel opens with Dashboard, IRD Menu, Minibar, Orders, Guest Platform tabs
Menu Designer shows Layout Presets and 6 Seasonal Templates
frontend_keyboard_shortcuts_tests: Alt+H opens Housekeeping panel with Room Board (65 rooms)
frontend_guest_order_tests: /guest-order auth screen loads with Room Number and Last Name inputs
Menu page shows All Day Menu with 17 items
Categories: Food & Dining (8), Beverages (3), Sundries (3), Amenities (3)
Menu items show emojis, descriptions, prices, prep times, Add buttons
